en_definition: freshwater port and largest city in Oregon; located in northwestern Oregon on the Willamette River which divides the city into east and west sections; renowned for its beautiful natural setting among the mountains
tr_definition: Oregon eyaletinin en büyük şehri ve Willamette Nehri üzerinde kurulu olan tatlı su limanı; doğal güzellikleri ve dağlık manzarasıyla tanınır.
ru_definition: Крупнейший город и пресноводный порт в штате Орегон, расположенный на реке Уилламетт; известен своими живописными природными ландшафтами и горами.
